NAVAREA XIX 64/17
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 290630 UTC JUN 17.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 
72-02.5N - 020-33.0E LEIV EIRIKSSON
72-19.7N - 019-54.6E SONGA ENABLER
71-16.6N - 022-16.8E SCARABEO 8
66-08.8N - 008-03.4E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT
WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 60/17
